name: Hybrid — text swap (safe) plus additive banner (fragile)
notes: Text swap on the hero headline plus additive banner into the home-banner anchor. Both ops target safe patterns in this lab structure (static template text + empty anchor child-list). Empirical observation: SURVIVES without reinforcement. The mixed-scope test value of this case is preserved by the annotator and companion correctly handling both op types simultaneously — even though Vue happens to tolerate each individually here.

Hybrid variation
